name: Creamy Lemonade Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 small packages Jello vanilla instant pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cold milk into a large bowl.
2. Add the pudding mixes and whisk until combined, about 30 seconds.
3. Gradually add the thawed lemonade and whisk again for another 30 seconds until thickened.
4. Stir in the Cool Whip and spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until set. Garnish with lemon slices.
